moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, continues this week with the Quarter-finals today and the Men's and Ladies' Singles Finals on Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: It's Quarter-finals day at Wimbledon! Who are you backing for a spot in the semis? Every serve, every volley, every point counts now.

angles.name: Road to the Final
angles.copy: The grass court glory is almost here. With finals weekend approaching, the tension at Wimbledon is electrifying. Who lifts the trophies this Sunday?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Knockouts
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is in full swing, with the knockout stages providing gripping football action leading up to the final on July 19.

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: The World Cup knockout stages are delivering pure drama! Which team has impressed you most so far, and who's your pick to go all the way?

angles.name: England's Journey
angles.copy: England's dramatic win over Mexico has everyone talking! Can the Three Lions keep their World Cup dream alive? The nation is watching!

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: A heatwave continues across the UK, with amber heat-health alerts issued for parts of England and temperatures potentially reaching 34-35°C, with a risk of thunderstorms later in the week.

angles.name: Stay Cool UK
angles.copy: Another hot one today! Stay hydrated and keep cool as the UK heatwave continues. Amber health alerts are in place for parts of England.

angles.name: Thunderstorm Watch
angles.copy: After the heat, there's a growing risk of thunderstorms towards the weekend. Keep an eye on the forecast and stay safe out there!

moments.title: Goodwood Festival of Speed
moments.blurb: The Goodwood Festival of Speed, celebrating motoring and motorsport, takes place from July 9-12, bringing speed and spectacle to West Sussex.

angles.name: Motorsport Mecca
angles.copy: Rev your engines! The Goodwood Festival of Speed kicks off on Thursday, bringing incredible cars and legendary drivers to West Sussex. Who's heading down?

angles.name: Need for Speed
angles.copy: From classic racers to future concepts, the hill climb at Goodwood is calling! Get ready for a weekend of high-octane thrills and automotive excellence.

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Continues
moments.blurb: The BST Hyde Park music festival is ongoing, with its final weekend running up to July 12, featuring a line-up of global headline artists.

angles.name: Hyde Park Vibes
angles.copy: BST Hyde Park is still bringing the biggest names to London! Who are you hoping to catch before the festival wraps up on Sunday?

angles.name: Summer Festival Season
angles.copy: The summer festival season is in full swing, and BST Hyde Park is delivering. Nothing beats live music in the heart of London!

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold UK No.1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' maintains its reign at No. 1 on the Official Singles Chart for a 15th non-consecutive week, making chart history.

angles.name: Chart Topper Reign
angles.copy: Still number one! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' makes history with its 15th week at the top of the Official Singles Chart. Can anything stop it?

angles.name: Trending Tracks
angles.copy: Beyond the No.1, SIENNA SPIRO, Shakira & Burna Boy, and Madonna are making waves on the Official Trending Chart. What's your new favourite tune?

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie reboot
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie' arrives on Netflix this Thursday, July 9, promising a fresh take on the classic family drama.

angles.name: Prairie Time
angles.copy: Get ready for a trip back in time! The new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie' lands on Netflix this Thursday. Will you be tuning in?

angles.name: Classic Reimagined
angles.copy: A beloved classic gets a fresh spin on Netflix this week. Perfect for family viewing, 'Little House on the Prairie' is set to capture new hearts.

moments.title: Ann Droid on BBC One
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in 'Ann Droid', a new BBC comedy set in 2029 about a robot designed to assist the elderly, premiering this July.

angles.name: Diane Morgan's New Comedy
angles.copy: Diane Morgan is back! Her new comedy 'Ann Droid' is coming to BBC One this July. Get ready for some futuristic laughs!

angles.name: Robot Companions
angles.copy: A robot designed to help the elderly – what could possibly go wrong? 'Ann Droid' sounds like the perfect quirky watch this summer.

moments.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
moments.blurb: Today, July 7, legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo!
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer of The Beatles. What's your favourite Ringo track?

angles.name: Beatles Icon
angles.copy: From Liverpool to global superstar, Ringo Starr is 86 today! Still an icon, still spreading the peace and love. Let's celebrate his amazing career!

moments.title: Jack White turns 51
moments.blurb: On Thursday, July 9, the dynamic musician and producer Jack White, known for The White Stripes and his solo work, celebrates his 51st birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Jack White
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White on Thursday! From The White Stripes to his solo projects, he's a true rock visionary. What's your top track?

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: A modern guitar hero turns 51 this week! Jack White's influence on rock music is undeniable. Celebrate his birthday by cranking up a classic!

moments.title: Mavis Staples turns 87
moments.blurb: On Friday, July 10, the legendary gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples, known for her work with The Staple Singers and her solo career, celebrates her 87th birthday.

angles.name: Mavis Staples Day
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the iconic Mavis Staples on Friday! A true legend of gospel and R&B, her voice is timeless. What's your favourite Staple Singers hit?

angles.name: Voice of Generations
angles.copy: Celebrating 87 years of incredible music! Mavis Staples continues to inspire with her powerful voice and message. A true living legend.

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins its practice days on July 12, with tournament play from July 16-19 at Royal Birkdale Golf Club.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Stage
angles.copy: The world's best golfers are heading to Royal Birkdale! Practice days for The Open Championship start this Sunday. Who's your early pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Championship Golf
angles.copy: Get ready for a week of incredible golf! The Open Championship returns to Royal Birkdale next week for its 154th edition. Don't miss a swing!

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: The second season of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premieres on Netflix this Sunday, July 12, catching up with the cast post-pods.

angles.name: Pod Life After
angles.copy: What happens after the pods? Find out as 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 drops on Netflix this Sunday! Who are you excited to catch up with?

angles.name: Reality TV Drama
angles.copy: New relationships, old drama, and unfinished business. 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' is back this weekend for more reality TV gold!

moments.title: Stewart Copeland turns 74
moments.blurb: On Thursday, July 16, Stewart Copeland, the legendary drummer of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday.

angles.name: Police Drummer's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the incredible Stewart Copeland on Thursday! The driving force behind The Police, his drumming is iconic. What's your favourite Police track?

angles.name: Rhythm King
angles.copy: A true rhythm king turns 74 this week! Stewart Copeland's unique style helped define an era. Let's celebrate his amazing musical legacy!

moments.title: Lucky premieres on Apple TV
moments.blurb: Anya Taylor-Joy stars in 'Lucky', a new high-stakes crime caper premiering on Apple TV on Wednesday, July 15.

angles.name: New Thriller Alert
angles.copy: Anya Taylor-Joy is back on our screens! 'Lucky', a new high-stakes crime caper, premieres on Apple TV this Wednesday. Get ready for some gripping drama!

angles.name: Midweek Binge
angles.copy: Looking for your next binge-watch? Anya Taylor-Joy's new thriller 'Lucky' drops on Apple TV this week. Perfect for a midweek escape!

moments.title: Geezer Butler turns 77
moments.blurb: On Friday, July 17, Geezer Butler, the influential bassist and lyricist for Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Sabbath Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the legendary Geezer Butler on Friday! The iconic bassist and lyricist of Black Sabbath. What's your favourite Sabbath riff?

angles.name: Metal Pioneer
angles.copy: A true pioneer of heavy metal turns 77 this week! Geezer Butler's contributions to music are immense. Crank up some Sabbath in celebration!
